description_long: This object consists of a small stack of three books placed on a circular, textured blue-gray rug. The top book is a thick yellow hardcover with a white sculpted bust of a bearded figure resting on it. The middle book is a slightly thinner white book with a green spine, and the bottom book is a larger white book with a red and blue spine. The books are neatly stacked, and the bust adds a decorative touch, suggesting a scholarly or artistic theme. The rug beneath the stack is plush and round, providing a soft base for the books. The overall appearance is tidy and visually interesting, with the bright yellow book and the white bust drawing the most attention.
description: A stack of three books on a round blue-gray rug, topped with a white sculpted bust. The top book is yellow and visually prominent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow book with a white bust on top, and the spines of all three books clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the back covers of the books and the back of the bust, with less detail on the book spines.
description_view_2: Angled rear view highlighting the thickness of the books and the side profile of the bust.
description_view_3: Side view with the yellow book's spine and the bust's face visible, as well as the colored spines of the lower books.
attribute_spine_design: The spine of the top book is yellow with black and blue text running vertically. The lower books have white spines with colored bands and horizontal text.
